chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D- 243 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1. For orders on office objections 2. For orders on CMA 1090/21 3. For hearing of CMA 1091/21 4. For hearing of main case 11-04-2023 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G a/w Munir Ahmed Soomro, Assistant Executive Engineer, Provincial Highways Khairpur. ***** In compliance of order dated 23.02.2023, learned AAG files inspection report of Assistant Commissioner, Khairpur, which is taken on record. Besides, learned counsel for the petitioners through statement files some documents, which are also taken on record. Assistant Executive Engineer, Provincial Highways Divison, Khairpur files brief report with regard to re-conditioning of road from National Highways bypass road at point Siyal Mori stop to Mari Petrol Pump Sim Nala Chowdgi stop via Tando Nazar Ali Road (7.00 km), which is also taken on record and copy whereof is supplied to learned counsel for the petitioners. As per report of the Executive Engineer Provincial Highways Division, Khairpur, he along with Assistant Commissioner, Khairpur jointly visited the site and observed that the condition of existing road is very poor, which reflected that same was not repaired for last 10-15 years and in last year, heavy rain also damaged the road badly, which requires sufficient repairing work. It is further stated in the report that Page 2 of 2 current financial year is approaching to its end, hence it is not possible to execute repair work without availability of funds and fulfillment of required paper formalities; however, his office has prepared feasibility report worth Rs.198.00 (M) approximately for upcoming ADP program in the year 2023-24.

As per report of the Executive Engineer Provincial Highways Division, Khairpur, he along with Assistant Commissioner, Khairpur jointly visited the site and observed that the condition of existing road is very poor, which reflected that same was not repaired for last 10-15 years and in last year, heavy rain also damaged the road badly, which requires sufficient repairing work. It is further stated in the report that Page 2 of 2 current financial year is approaching to its end, hence it is not possible to execute repair work without availability of funds and fulfillment of required paper formalities; however, his office has prepared feasibility report worth Rs.198.00 (M) approximately for upcoming ADP program in the year 2023-24. Let the Executive Engineer, Provincial Highways Division, Khairpur submit feasibility report to the Chairman, Planning & Development Department, Government of Sindh and Secretary, Works & Services Department, Government of Sindh, who shall incorporate the scheme of repairing of subject road in upcoming ADP program in the year 2023-24 and shall allocate sufficient funds to execute the repair work of subject road. Office is directed to communicate copy of this order to the Chairman, P&D Department, Government of Sindh and Secretary, Works & Services department, Government of Sindh for compliance. To come up on 10.08.2023. Office is also directed to supply copy of this order to learned AAG for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
